mapper.select: SELECT d.dataset_id AS id, d.user_id AS userId, d.dataset_name AS name, d.category_name AS categoryName, u.user_name AS userName, d.create_time AS createTime, d.update_time AS updateTime FROM dashboard_dataset d LEFT JOIN dashboard_user u ON u.user_id = d.user_id ORDER BY d.dataset_name

SELECT d.dataset_id AS id, d.user_id AS userId, d.dataset_name AS name, d.data_json AS data, d.category_name AS categoryName, u.user_name AS userName, d.create_time AS createTime, d.update_time AS updateTime FROM dashboard_dataset d LEFT JOIN dashboard_user u ON u.user_id = d.user_id WHERE d.dataset_id = #{datasetId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dashboard_dataset (user_id, dataset_name, data_json, category_name) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{data}, #{categoryName})
mapper.update: UPDATE dashboard_dataset SET dataset_name = #{name}, data_json = #{data}, category_name = #{categoryName}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE dataset_id = #{id}
